author: Haakon Wibe
description: Demonstrates comparison operators for flexible detection logic
notes: Comparison operators allow flexible detection beyond exact equality.
Detection uses the specified operator, remediation sets the 'data' value.
Exception: 'NotExists' comparison deletes the value during remediation.
Use cases: version checks, range validation, partial string matching, cleanup.

settings.name: Minimum Security Version
settings.description: Ensure security baseline version is at least 100

settings.name: Homepage Contains Company Domain
settings.description: Verify homepage URL includes company domain

settings.name: Log Path Starts With Approved Location
settings.description: Ensure logs go to approved directory

settings.name: Remove Legacy Debug Setting
settings.description: Ensure debug mode is not enabled (value should not exist)

settings.name: Verify Config Exists
settings.description: Check that configuration value exists (any value acceptable)

settings.name: Cache Size Within Limit
settings.description: Ensure cache size is not exceeding 1000 MB
